title: Tower Cerastone T81242 Forged Frying Pan with Non-Stick Coating and Soft Touch Handles, 28cm, Graphite
features: 28CM FRYING PAN: its large 28cm diameter provides enough cooking space for family meals and entertaining, so you can serve up fluffy pancakes and flavoursome stir-fry dishes with ease
SUPERIOR NON-STICK COATING: the multi-layer Cerastone coating is 5x stronger than other non-stick coatings, so you can enjoy healthy meals using little or no oil
QUALITY CONSTRUCTION: high quality, long-lasting forged aluminium body enables quick and easy adjustment of temperatures for more efficient cooking results, with no hot spots
FREE FROM CHEMICALS: its Cerastone coating is PFAS, PFOA, PTFE, Lead and Cadmium free – ideal for any avid cook
5 YEAR GUARANTEE: trusted tower quality with a standard 1 year manufacturer’s guarantee and a 4 year extension, subject to product registration online
description: From the manufacturer Our brand’s strength comes from its heritage – something that can’t be forged and something that allows us to continue offering highly desirable housewares products to a wide customer-base with unshakable brand loyalty. Quality, Innovation and Value. Customers' Trusted Brand Healthy Cooking for Decades Desirable Electrical and Housewares Products Tower Cerastone T81242 Forged Frying Pan with Non-Stick Coating and Soft Touch Handles, 28cm, Graphite Create delicious hearty English breakfasts, healthy stir-fry and even pancakes with the Tower 28cm Forged Fry Pan. With a thick forged aluminium body in a lightweight design, this pan offers enhanced durability with easy manoeuvrability, suitable for all users. Its 28cm diameter makes it ideal for one or all the family while its silicone soft touch handle offers comfort and control. Suitable for all hobs including induction, this pan requires a simple hand wash to maintain optimum performance. Forged aluminium body for enhanced durability Superior Cerastone coated non-stick interior for easy cleaning Soft touch stay cool phenolic handle for comfortable control Bonded steel base for even heat distribution Stylish heat resistant colour matching exterior Suitable for all hob types including induction Do not use in oven or under the grill Dishwasher suitable / Hand wash recommended CERASTONE COATING Features a superior multi-layered ceramic stone construction with non-stick qualities, using less oil for virtually fat free cooking BONDED STEEL BASE Provides even heat distribution for better cooking results and is suitable for all hob types QUALITY CONSTRUCTION Cerasure non-stick ceramic coating for a healthier alternative to your family favourites
